# Prism Docs (LLMs)

Canonical zone URL: /docs

This is the documentation zone for Prism.

Important pages:
- /docs
- /docs/getting-started
- /docs/guides/installation
- /docs/index
- /docs/aboute

API endpoints:
- /docs/api/search?q=<query>
- /docs/api/og?title=<title>&section=<section>

For expanded context, see:
- /docs/llms-full.txt
